positive_monomial_terms_sum_fn(List.cons(Pair.new(d(Nat.0), start), coeff_positive_monomial_data_from(tail, start.suc, k)), y) = d(Nat.0) * y.pow(start.suc) + positive_monomial_terms_sum_fn(coeff_positive_monomial_data_from(tail, start.suc, k), y)

y.pow(start.suc) * (y * coeff_eval(tail, y, k)) = y.pow(start.suc.suc) * coeff_eval(tail, y, k)

y.pow(start.suc) * coeff_eval(d, y, k.suc) = positive_monomial_terms_sum_fn(coeff_positive_monomial_data_from(d, start, k.suc), y)
